title: Validation errors return 422 instead of 400
evidence: lib/book_api/web/router.ex:49 — returns 422 Unprocessable Entity for changeset errors
suggestion: 422 is idiomatic for Ecto/Plug apps and is an appropriate HTTP status code; no change needed

title: Author filter uses LIKE with user-supplied wildcards
evidence: lib/book_api/books.ex:20 — like(fragment("lower(?)", b.author), ^...) allows % and _ in user input to act as wildcards
suggestion: Escape % and _ in user input before interpolating into the LIKE pattern if strict substring match is desired
